programs.title: Best Foods Comedy Gala 2026
programs.desc: Join host Dai Henwood and an all-star lineup of international and local acts for the Best Foods Comedy Gala, the showstopper event that kicks off the Comedy Festival.

programs.title: The Graham Norton Show
programs.desc: Graham's guests are superstar actor and singer Cher, actor Michael Fassbender, double Oscar nominee Keira Knightley and Hollywood star Josh Brolin. With music from Jalen Ngonda.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of London: The New R
programs.desc: Amanda, Juliet Mayhew, and Nessie all find themselves in the hot seat.

programs.title: Cake Boss
programs.desc: Carlo's team takes a cake order for delivery to all the way to Saudi Arabia. Back home a fight is brewing over the bakery's signature pastry.
